title: Hannah Senesh Archive
description: Collection-level lead for Hannah Senesh diaries, manuscripts, correspondence, and related handwritten materials.

rights.evidence_text: Seed notes report item pages marked Any Use Permitted and Public Domain in Israel.

ingest.access_notes: Prioritize item-level NLI archive records with explicit download access and rights labels.

evidence.quote: clearest source family; several specific item pages explicitly handwritten, Hebrew, post-1929, Any Use Permitted
Hannah Senesh Archive features public domain scans

title: Category: Handwritten Hebrew letters

title: Modern Hebrew Baseline Dataset
